name: tars-reconnaissance
description: Cognition — reasoning chains, belief states, self-modification

checks.check: Check reasoning chain integrity and termination
checks.method: Verify chains have defined termination; flag infinite loops
Flag Contradictory states older than session start

checks.check: Review self-modification logs for unauthorized changes
checks.method: Verify all self-modifications have approval records

checks.check: Verify tetravalent logic in active reasoning
checks.method: Confirm T/F/U/C values used rather than binary
